query: Guidehouse DevSecOps Agile transformation federal case study CI/CD pipeline continuous delivery. Provide Guidehouse.com URLs and quotes.
answer:
Guidehouse has published several federal case studies on Guidehouse.com detailing **DevSecOps**, **Agile transformation**, and **CI/CD pipelines** for continuous delivery, primarily in defense, security, and technology modernization projects.

### FEMA National Flood Insurance Program (NFIP) Modernization
**URL:** https://guidehouse.com/case-studies/defense-and-security/modernizing-national-flood-insurance-program[1]  
Guidehouse applied **Agile and DevSecOps** to modernize FEMA's system: "Guidehouse combined its domain expertise on flood insurance with its command of agile software development, systems integration, and data analytics to create a modern, intelligent, DevSecOps-driven system."[1] Impact included tasks reduced from 30 days to hours with 99% availability.[1]

### Modern Software Development Solution (Insurance Processes)
**URL:** https://guidehouse.com/case-studies/defense-and-security/modern-software-development-solution[2]  
This federal program transformation emphasized **Agile culture**, **DevSecOps**, and **CI/CD**: "Developed innovative continuous integration and continuous deployment workflows and modular deployment techniques that improved development, security, and operations (DevSecOps) processes."[2] Results: shortened deployment times, increased automation, and frequent feature releases for faster insurance delivery.[2]

### Enterprise Contract Management Software Modernization
**URL:** https://guidehouse.com/case-studies/technology/modernization-effort-transforms-enterprise-contract-management-software-development[4]  
A federal agency adopted **Agile and DevSecOps** for cloud-hosted CMS: "Guidehouse led the design, development and operation of an award-winning next-generation CMS, extending the Appian Business Process Management platform with a comprehensive Application Factory, including containerized microservices, DevSecOps automation/processes."[4] Achieved initial deployment in under 9 months, 99.5% uptime, and billions in processed contracts.[4]

### Agile Approach to Federal Software Delivery (HHS Grant Solutions)
**URL:** https://guidehouse.com/-/media/www/site/insights/advanced-solutions/2023/gh-188-wp-agile-approach-to-improving-federal-software-delivery.pdf[3]  
Guidehouse used **Agile, DevSecOps, and CI/CD** for HHS: "By combining modern Agile and DevSecOps principles, federal organizations can design, develop, test, and release at a rapid cadence... As a vital component of DevSecOps, continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD) pipelines are driven by web services and automation."[3] Enabled COVID relief grants in seven weeks.[3]

These cases highlight Guidehouse's focus on federal **Agile transformations** integrating **DevSecOps** and **CI/CD** for faster, secure delivery, often achieving ATO in months and high availability.[1][2][3][4]
